the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert that covers much of the southern part of the country. the gobi is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rocky plateaus, and ancient ruins. it is also home to a variety of wildlife, including the elusive snow leopard. in addition to the gobi desert, other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the huguun khan mountain, the khustain naini national park, and the ancient capital of khanbaliq. these places offer visitors a chance to experience the natural beauty and rich history of mongolia.
